items.title: Crypto traders betting on a rally lose $563 million in liquidations. Ether and bitcoin suffer the most
items.summary: Ether and bitcoin led liquidations, as their prices dropped on macroeconomic concerns.

items.title: Bitcoin slides under $77,000 as oil shock and Treasury yields hit risk assets
items.summary: Long-term holders are still sitting tight and exchange balances remain near six-year lows, Binance Research data shows, but underwater short-term holders leave BTC vulnerable to macro shocks.

items.title: Senate crypto bill at risk beyond midterms if not passed by August: NYDIG
items.summary: NYDIG’s Greg Cipolaro says the Senate’s crypto market structure bill is at risk of failing if it cannot clear a floor vote by August.

items.title: STRC preferred stock investors are mispricing major 'dislocation' risk: Analyst
items.summary: Potential liquidity contractions in secondary markets and surging government bond yields could spell trouble for preferred perpetual stockholders.

items.title: CME, ICE push U.S. regulators to scrutinize Hyperliquid over manipulation risks
items.summary: CME Group and ICE have reportedly warned the CFTC and Capitol Hill officials that Hyperliquid’s decentralized perpetual futures platform could enable market manipulation and sanctions evasion.

items.title: Trailmark turns code into graphs
items.summary: We’re open-sourcing Trailmark, a library that parses source code into a queryable call graph of functions, classes, call relationships, and semantic metadata, then exposes that graph through a Python API that Claude skills can call directly. Install it now: uv pip install trailma

items.title: Crypto security is turning into an AI arms race as agents may overwhelm compliance teams
items.summary: AI agents and automated payments could reach a scale that crypto monitoring systems built for human-paced markets cannot handle, Elliptic CEO Simone Maini warned.

items.title: Aave restores ether borrowing limits after $230 million exploit
items.summary: The DeFi lending protocol reversed restrictions imposed after April’s $292 million exploit, restoring borrowing capacity across six networks as contagion fears ease.

items.title: Bitcoin Depot, North America's largest bitcoin ATM operator, files for bankruptcy
items.summary: Bitcoin Depot, the largest bitcoin ATM operator in North America and publicly listed on Nasdaq, has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy.

items.title: Iran may be turning the Strait of Hormuz into a bitcoin-based insurance market, local reports say
items.summary: State-linked Fars News reported that Iran’s economy ministry has been working on a plan to manage shipping through the Strait with payments in bitcoin.

items.title: HYPE pops 7%, beating bitcoin declines, as SpaceX pre-IPO lands on Hyperliquid
items.summary: Hyperliquid's HYPE token rallied 7% over 24 hours after Trade.xyz launched the first pre-IPO perpetual market on the platform, offering synthetic exposure to SpaceX at a reference valuation of $1.78 trillion.

items.title: Yet another crypto bridge falls victim to an $11 million hack
items.summary: The latest attack adds to growing string of cross-chain infrastructure exploits.

items.title: Kraken cuts 150 staff amid AI efficiencies, potentially delaying IPO: Report
items.summary: Kraken has cut 150 staff due to the rising use of AI, adding to more than 5,000 layoffs across the crypto sector so far this year, Bloomberg reports.

items.title: Verus Ethereum bridge reportedly exploited for $11.6M in latest DeFi attack
items.summary: Two security companies have flagged the address where the stolen funds are allegedly being held, showing the cryptocurrencies have been converted into 5,402 Ether.

items.title: Surging oil prices have been driving Ether selling pressure: Tom Lee
items.summary: Fundstrat's Tom Lee pointed out an inverse correlation between crude and Ether as oil surged back to around $110 on Monday.

items.title: Reports suggest Iran is mulling Hormuz ‘insurance’ scheme, paid in Bitcoin
items.summary: Screenshots of a website called “Hormuz Safe” have been circulating on social media, which offers “digital insurance” for ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Analysts debate whether Bitcoin is in ‘sell in May’ bear market setup
items.summary: Some analysts argue that a comparatively broadened, institutionalized buyer base for crypto today may prevent a repeat of the drawdowns seen in May 2018 and May 2022.

items.title: WETH markets return to normal operations on Aave amid rsETH recovery progress
items.summary: Aave applied a temporary freeze to WETH as a precautionary safety measure in response to the Kelp DAO exploit, alongside freezes on the rsETH and wrsETH reserves.

items.title: Grayscale, VanEck amend US spot BNB ETF filings, stepping closer to potential launch
items.summary: The US securities regulator approved 21Shares’ Hyperliquid ETF last week, adding to a growing number of cryptocurrencies converted into ETF wrappers in the US.

items.title: The Clarity Act took a step forward: State of Crypto
items.summary: Unpacking Thursday's at-times contentious markup hearing.
